arts.ttl: Marcus Thuram makes £70m transfer statement amid Premier League interest
arts.sum: Marcus Thuram has sent the strongest signal yet about his future amid transfer interest from Premier League clubs. The France international has been in sensational form for Inter Milan this season, scoring 12 goals and providing three assists in 17 Serie A appearances. arts.ttl: Inter go to Cagliari on the hunt for the top spot
arts.sum: Inter have won 10 of their last 13 Serie A matches against Cagliari (D2 L1), scoring 33 goals in that period (2.5 goals per match on average); the Sardinians` last win against the Nerazzurri in the competition was back inMarch 2019 (2-1 at Unipol Domus). Inter have won seven of their last eight away matches against Cagliari in Serie A (L1), including each of their last four; despite this, the Sardinians have scored in seven of these eight home matches.

arts.ttl: Ultra Investigation: Beretta’s testimony Implicates Marotta, Inter deny allegations
arts.sum: New details have emerged in the ongoing investigation into the ultra groups of Inter and AC Milan. A recent report from Corriere della Sera reveals portions of testimony given by Andrea Beretta, a 49-year-old leader of Inter's ultras, who was arrested on September 4th for the murder of Antonio Bellocco, a member of the 'Ndrangheta crime family. The post Ultra Investigation: Beretta’s testimony Implicates Marotta, Inter deny allegations appeared first on FootItalia.com.
